title: Elevated Post-Prandial Blood Glucose 195 mg/dL
description: Blood glucose 195 mg/dL (post-prandial) exceeds target of <180 mg/dL. Rising from 168 mg/dL previously.
clinical_context: Patient has T2DM with hyperglycemia, on Metformin 1000mg BID. ADA target fasting glucose is 80-130 mg/dL, post-prandial <180 mg/dL.
